records.ety: [L. ambitiosus: cf. F. ambitieux. See Ambition.]

defs: Possessing, or controlled by, ambition; greatly or inordinately desirous of power, honor, office, superiority, or distinction.
quotes: Yet Brutus says he was ambitious, And Brutus is an honorable man.

defs: Strongly desirous; -- followed by of or the infinitive; as, ambitious to be or to do something.
quotes: I was not ambitious of seeing this ceremony.
Studious of song, and yet ambitious not to sing in vain.

defs: Springing from, characterized by, or indicating, ambition; showy; aspiring; as, an ambitious style.
quotes: A giant statue . . . Pushed by a wild and artless race, From off wide, ambitious base.
